title: マイルCSの後に・キングの訓示

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's finished. The race we've been working towards
with King Halo since summer is now over.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
King Halo clawed her way up from rock bottom,
and Agnes Digital bore witness to the entire
journey.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Do you understand now that we've run a great
match together, Digital?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Do you understand what kind of runner I am?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Yes... I do...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
What's wrong? I can't hear you properly through
all those tears.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Your essence... rained down upon me, and I was
completely enveloped.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
You've taught me what it means to live as an
Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It's to have a soul possessed by the persistent will
to run! Instinct! To have, whether perfect or not,
the strength of will to be first-rate!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I knew nothing before—not as a fan or as an
athlete!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But now I understand clearly. Self-deprecation or
self-pity? Don't make me laugh. Just run! If you
want to cry, do it while you run!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Before, I only saw Umamusume for what they
were on the surface. But now that I have peered
into their depths...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I love them more than ever!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hehe. You're a real Umamusume fan, huh?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Well, just as I must be true to myself, you must be yourself. If you truly cherish all Umamusume...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Race against as many as you can and absorb
everything. And then...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Become a true all-rounder. You yourself are one
of the Umamusume that you love so much.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Yes, ma'am!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, my kindred spirit. I return to you bearing
words of wisdom from King.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
She says I must run against as many Umamusume
as possible. Is there a way to configure this into
our next objective?
choice_data_list:
Guess we're gonna have to go on a racing
binge.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
A racing binge! Hmhmmm! You mean we should
register for all the G1 races we can, right? Turf
and dirt!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
In that case, I'm in! And then, next year, I'll be
able to face the most intense Horsegirl combo ever—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Opera O and Doto!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Hey, Opera O. Did you hear about Digital?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. According to the fine editors of Lord's
Tribune Online, she put on a good show at the
Mile Championship.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
She'll be a senior as well next year. We should
welcome her wholeheartedly in each race she
endeavors to run.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Definitely. But... it seems like she's gotten really strong. ...Do you think we'll be okay? Will I be okay?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha! That remains to be seen, but Digital
also has a flaw.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
There's something crucial she lacks, as a
consequence of her unique aptitude.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
She is a rare and elusive all-rounder, yes,
possessed with the strange ability to run
unhindered on both turf and dirt.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But that ability is what robs her of the
opportunity to attain one ever-important thing.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Something crucial she can't attain... What is it?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: A peer with whom to run. Put simply, a rival!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Like what you are to me, Doto, and I to you.
Without a sworn enemy, there's no one to push
her skills ever upward.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
In other words, Digital is like a nomad with no
defined path. And because she walks a path all
her own, no one can walk it beside her.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Given that, can she truly triumph over the likes of
us? I, for one, am tickled with anticipation to
discover that answer.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Next year... Can Agnes Digital put on a good
show at her G1 races and stand before her two
idols?
